import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaFacebook, FaTwitter, FaInstagram, FaLinkedin, FaGithub, FaEnvelope, FaPhone, FaMapMarkerAlt, FaHeart } from 'react-icons/fa'; const Footer = () => { const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); const styles = { footer: { background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1f2937 0%, #111827 100%)', color: 'white', padding: '4rem 2rem 1.5rem', marginTop: 'auto', borderTop: '3px solid #4f46e5' }, container: { maxWidth: '1200px', margin: '0 auto' }, grid: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(1, 1fr)', gap: '2rem', '@media (min-width: 768px)': { gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)' } }, section: { h3: { fontSize: '1.2rem', marginBottom: '1.5rem', color: '#e5e7eb', fontWeight: '600', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.5rem' }, p: { color: '#9ca3af', lineHeight: '1.6', marginBottom: '1rem' } }, links: { listStyle: 'none', padding: 0, a: { color: '#9ca3af', textDecoration: 'none', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.5rem', marginBottom: '0.75rem', transition: 'all 0.3s', padding: '0.5rem 0', borderRadius: '5px', '&:hover': { color: 'white', transform: 'translateX(5px)', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', paddingLeft: '10px' } } }, contactInfo: { listStyle: 'none', padding: 0, li: { color: '#9ca3af', marginBottom: '1rem', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', fontSize: '0.95rem' } }, bottom: { borderTop: '1px solid #374151', marginTop: '3rem', paddingTop: '1.5rem', textAlign: 'center', color: '#9ca3af', fontSize: '0.9rem' }, socialLinks: { display: 'flex', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '1.5rem', a: { color: '#9ca3af', fontSize: '1.2rem', transition: 'all 0.3s', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', width: '40px', height: '40px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', '&:hover': { color: 'white', background: '#4f46e5', transform: 'translateY(-3px)' } } }, logo: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.5rem', fontSize: '1.5rem', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '1rem', color: 'white', textDecoration: 'none' }, subscribe: { marginTop: '1rem' }, subscribeInput: { width: '100%', padding: '0.75rem', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', border: '1px solid #374151', borderRadius: '8px', color: 'white', marginBottom: '0.5rem', '&::placeholder': { color: '#9ca3af' } }, subscribeButton: { width: '100%', padding: '0.75rem', background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', color: 'white', border: 'none', borderRadius: '8px', cursor: 'pointer', fontWeight: '500', transition: 'all 0.3s', '&:hover': { background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4338ca, #6d28d9)', transform: 'translateY(-2px)' } }, quickStats: { display: 'flex', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '1rem', flexWrap: 'wrap' }, statItem: { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', padding: '0.75rem', borderRadius: '8px', textAlign: 'center', flex: 1, minWidth: '80px' }, statNumber: { fontSize: '1.5rem', fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#4f46e5', marginBottom: '0.25rem' }, statLabel: { fontSize: '0.8rem', color: '#9ca3af' } }; return (
